# Hook Execution Flow

Sequence showing how Claude Code triggers hooks through `ecc-hook` and `run-with-flags.js` with profile-based gating.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant CC as Claude Code
    participant HJ as hooks.json
    participant EH as ecc-hook (bin)
    participant RWF as run-with-flags.ts
    participant HF as hook-flags.ts
    participant HS as Hook Script

    CC->>HJ: Event fires (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, ...)
    HJ->>HJ: Match event + tool matcher
    HJ->>EH: ecc-hook "hookId" "dist/hooks/script.js" "profiles"
    Note over CC,EH: stdin: JSON with tool input/output

    EH->>EH: Set ECC_ROOT from package location
    EH->>RWF: require("run-with-flags.js")

    RWF->>RWF: Read stdin (max 1MB)
    RWF->>HF: isHookEnabled(hookId, profiles)

    alt Hook Disabled
        HF-->>RWF: false
        RWF-->>CC: Passthrough stdin (no-op)
    else Hook Enabled
        HF-->>RWF: true
        RWF->>RWF: Resolve script path via ECC_ROOT
        RWF->>HS: spawnSync("node", [scriptPath], stdin)
        HS-->>RWF: stdout + stderr
        RWF-->>CC: stdout (returned to Claude) + stderr (shown to user)
    end
```
